news.title: 3peak Launches TPC1610 16-Bit High-Speed ADC
news.summary: New TPC1610 delivers 16-bit resolution at 1MSPS with excellent linearity for industrial measurement applications.

content.text: 3peak has officially launched the TPC1610, a high-performance 16-bit successive approximation register (SAR) ADC with 1MSPS sample rate. This new product expands 3peak's data converter portfolio and targets industrial control, instrumentation, and automotive applications.
High-Performance Data Conversion

The TPC1610 addresses the growing demand for high-precision, high-speed data conversion in industrial applications. With ±1 LSB INL, 90dB SNR, and single-supply operation, it provides an excellent balance of performance and ease of use.
Key Features
The TPC1610 is pin-compatible and performance-equivalent to industry standards like ADI's AD7980 and TI's ADS8319, offering customers a domestic alternative with better supply security.

news.author: 3peak Marketing

news.title: 3peak Achieves IATF 16949 Automotive Certification
news.summary: Company demonstrates commitment to automotive quality management with international certification.

content.text: 3peak announced today that it has successfully achieved IATF 16949:2016 certification for its automotive quality management system. This certification recognizes 3peak's commitment to meeting the stringent quality requirements of the automotive industry.
Automotive Quality Standards

The IATF 16949 certification covers all aspects of 3peak's automotive product development and manufacturing processes. The company has implemented comprehensive quality management procedures including advanced product quality planning (APQP), production part approval process (PPAP), and continuous improvement processes.
Automotive Product Portfolio

items: Automotive grade ADCs and voltage references
CAN bus and LIN interface transceivers
Power management ICs for vehicle systems

content.text: Achieving IATF 16949 certification is a significant milestone that demonstrates our commitment to the automotive market. We are now qualified to supply products to major automotive OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers worldwide.
content.author: Dr. Zhang Wei, VP of Quality

news.author: 3peak Corporate Communications

news.title: 3peak Partners with Industrial Automation Leader
news.summary: Strategic partnership to integrate 3peak analog components into industrial control systems.

content.text: 3peak has entered into a strategic partnership with a leading industrial automation company to integrate 3peak's operational amplifiers, ADCs, and interface chips into their next-generation industrial control systems.
Industrial Market Expansion

This partnership marks 3peak's significant expansion in the industrial automation market. The combination of 3peak's high-performance analog components and the partner's system expertise is expected to deliver compelling solutions for factory automation and process control.
Integrated Solutions

items: Precision sensor interfaces for temperature and pressure

content.text: Products are expected to launch in Q2 2024 with competitive pricing and local technical support.

news.author: 3peak Business Development

news.title: 3peak Expands Automotive Product Portfolio
news.summary: New AEC-Q100 qualified products target electric vehicle battery management and motor control.

content.text: 3peak has announced the expansion of its automotive product portfolio with new AEC-Q100 qualified devices targeting electric vehicle (EV) applications. The new products include high-precision operational amplifiers for battery management systems (BMS) and gate drivers for motor control.
EV Application Focus

The expanded portfolio addresses critical EV subsystems including battery cell monitoring, current sensing, temperature measurement, and motor control. All products are qualified to AEC-Q100 Grade 1 (-40°C to +125°C) with enhanced EMC performance.
New Product Highlights

items: Isolated gate drivers for power modules
CAN FD transceivers for vehicle networks

content.text: 3peak is working with major EV manufacturers and Tier 1 suppliers to qualify these products for production programs.

news.author: 3peak Automotive Team

news.title: 3peak Invests $50M in High-Precision Analog R&D
news.summary: Major investment to develop next-generation precision analog products for industrial and automotive markets.

content.text: 3peak announced a $50 million investment over the next three years to develop next-generation high-precision analog products. This investment will accelerate the development of ultra-low offset amplifiers, high-resolution ADCs, and precision voltage references.
Technology Roadmap

The investment will fund development of: operational amplifiers with <10μV offset voltage, 20-bit and 24-bit precision ADCs, ultra-low noise voltage references, and isolated signal conditioning products. First products are expected to sample in 2025.
Research Focus Areas
The investment will also expand 3peak's engineering team by 150 additional R&D personnel across its Suzhou, Shanghai, and Shenzhen design centers.

news.author: 3peak Corporate Communications

news.title: 3peak Components Power 50,000+ Test Equipment Units
news.summary: Major deployment in test and measurement equipment demonstrates reliability and performance.

content.text: 3peak announced that its precision operational amplifiers and ADCs have been deployed in over 50,000 test and measurement instruments including digital multimeters, oscilloscopes, and data acquisition systems. This large-scale deployment validates 3peak's product quality and reliability.
Test Equipment Market Success

The deployment includes precision measurement equipment from leading domestic and international manufacturers. 3peak's TP156x op-amps and TPC1610 ADCs provide the accuracy and stability required for high-precision test applications.
Deployment Results

items: Zero field failures related to 3peak components

content.text: This successful deployment has established 3peak as a trusted supplier in the demanding test and measurement market.

news.author: 3peak Test & Measurement Team

news.title: 3peak Wins China IC Design Achievement Award
news.summary: Recognized for breakthrough achievements in high-precision analog IC design and market impact.

content.text: 3peak has been honored with the China IC Design Achievement Award for its significant contributions to high-precision analog semiconductor technology. The award recognizes 3peak's breakthrough in developing operational amplifiers and data converters that compete with international vendors.
Award Recognition

The China IC Design Achievement Award specifically acknowledges 3peak's success in developing precision analog products with specifications matching or exceeding international competitors. The company's TP156x op-amps with 50μV offset and TPC1610 ADC with 16-bit resolution have disrupted the domestic market.
Industry Impact

3peak's achievements have reduced China's dependence on imported precision analog chips. The company's products are now used by leading industrial, automotive, and test equipment manufacturers, replacing previously imported components.
Future Commitment

In accepting the award, 3peak's CEO reaffirmed the company's commitment to continued innovation in precision analog technology and expanding into new markets including medical electronics and aerospace.

news.author: 3peak Corporate Communications

news.title: 3peak International Sales Grow 120% Year-over-Year
news.summary: Strong growth in overseas markets driven by industrial automation and automotive applications.

content.text: 3peak reported 120% year-over-year growth in international sales, driven by strong demand for its precision analog products in industrial automation, automotive, and test equipment applications. The company has expanded its distribution network to over 15 countries.
Global Market Expansion

Key growth markets include Europe (industrial automation), Southeast Asia (manufacturing equipment), and India (automotive electronics). The company has established local technical support teams and distribution partnerships to better serve international customers.
Product Localization
3peak has adapted its product offerings to meet international standards and certification requirements. Products now carry CE marking and comply with RoHS and REACH regulations for European markets.
This international expansion represents 3peak's strategy to diversify its revenue base while leveraging its competitive technology advantages in precision analog.

news.author: 3peak International Sales
